Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class Pot3DFormat

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.Pot3DFormat
public class Pot3DFormat extends Object
Provides configuration formats for 3D pot rendering, including rotation, bevel, material, and lighting.

This class serves as a factory and container for various style attributes used to define the visual appearance of a 3D pot. It offers fluent builders for rotation and bevel settings, and enumerations for material and lighting presets. All methods are static, and the nested classes are designed for chained configuration.

Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

    Class
    Description
    static class 
    Pot3DFormat.Bevel
    Represents a bevel (edge) style configuration for a pot.
    static enum 
    Pot3DFormat.Lighting
    Enumerates available lighting environment presets for pot rendering.
    static enum 
    Pot3DFormat.Material
    Enumerates available material surface types for pot rendering.
    static class 
    Pot3DFormat.Rotation
    Represents a 3D rotation configuration for a pot.

  • Constructor Details

    • Pot3DFormat

      public Pot3DFormat()

  • Method Details

    • rotation

      public static Pot3DFormat.Rotation rotation()
      Creates a new, default rotation configuration builder.

      Returns a new Rotation instance with all angles initialized to zero degrees. The returned builder can be used to set rotation angles fluently.

      Returns:
      a new Rotation builder instance

      Usage Example

      
 Pot3DFormat.Rotation rot = Pot3DFormat.rotation().x(10).y(20).z(5);
      See Also:
      • Pot3DFormat.Rotation

    • bevel

      public static Pot3DFormat.Bevel bevel()
      Creates a new bevel configuration builder with the "circle" preset.

      Returns a new Bevel instance preset to a circular shape. The initial width and height are zero.

      Returns:
      a new Bevel builder instance with the "circle" preset

      Usage Example

      
 Pot3DFormat.Bevel bev = Pot3DFormat.bevel().size(3.0, 1.5);
      See Also:
      • Pot3DFormat.Bevel

    • square

      public static Pot3DFormat.Bevel square()
      Creates a new bevel configuration builder with the "square" preset.

      Returns a new Bevel instance preset to a square shape. The initial width and height are zero.

      Returns:
      a new Bevel builder instance with the "square" preset

      Usage Example

      
 Pot3DFormat.Bevel bev = Pot3DFormat.square().size(4.0, 4.0);
      See Also:
      • Pot3DFormat.Bevel

    • relaxedInset

      public static Pot3DFormat.Bevel relaxedInset()
      Creates a new bevel configuration builder with the "relaxedInset" preset.

      Returns a new Bevel instance preset to a relaxed inset shape. The initial width and height are zero.

      Returns:
      a new Bevel builder instance with the "relaxedInset" preset

      Usage Example

      
 Pot3DFormat.Bevel bev = Pot3DFormat.relaxedInset().size(2.5, 1.0);
      See Also:
      • Pot3DFormat.Bevel

    • slant

      public static Pot3DFormat.Bevel slant()
      Creates a new bevel configuration builder with the "slant" preset.

      Returns a new Bevel instance preset to a slanted shape. The initial width and height are zero.

      Returns:
      a new Bevel builder instance with the "slant" preset

      Usage Example

      
 Pot3DFormat.Bevel bev = Pot3DFormat.slant().size(6.0, 3.0);
      See Also:
      • Pot3DFormat.Bevel
